member.summary: Occurs when changes occur that affect whether or not the command should execute.

member.name: M:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DeBugCommand.CanExecute(System.Object)
member.summary: Defines the method that determines whether the command can execute in its current state.
member.param: Data used by the command. If the command does not require data to be passed,this object can be set to null.
member.returns: true if this command can be executed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DeBugCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: Defines the method to be called when the command is invoked.
member.param: Data used by the command. If the command does not require data to be passed,this object can be set to null.

member.summary: 转换文件任务取消资源对象

member.summary: 监控文件任务取消资源对象

member.name: M:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DocumentTransform.StaScheduler.QueueTask(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: 将任务对象排队到调度器

member.name: M:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DocumentTransform.StaScheduler.GetScheduledTasks
member.summary: 获取当前调度在该调度器上的任务的枚举。

member.name: M:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DocumentTransform.StaScheduler.TryExecuteTaskInline(System.Threading.Tasks.Task,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 在当前线程上执行指定任务的尝试。
member.param: 一个布尔值，表示以前已排入任务。 如果此参数为 True，则该任务可能已以前排队 （计划）;如果为 False，则已知该任务无法已排队，以便执行内联任务，而队列不进行此调用它。
member.returns: 一个布尔值，该值指示该任务以内联方式执行。

member.name: P:SIE.Wpf.ESop.DocumentTransform.StaScheduler.MaximumConcurrencyLevel
member.summary: 获取此调度器支持的最大并发级别。
